case_title: MAURICE E SINGLETON VS. BRIDGETTE MOORE ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED MAY-31-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, BRIDGETTE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED MAY-31-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED MAY-31-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, LASHAUN

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINGLETON, MAURICE E ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT BRIDGETTE MOORE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ZEKE WEINER, DIRECTOR HOUSING OPERATIONS. DEFENDANT LASHAUN WILLIAMS IS PRESENT. AFTER THE DEFENDANT'S WERE DISMISSED FOR NON APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, PLAINTIFF APPEARED AT THE END OF THE CALENDAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE LUBARSKY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,176.26 FILED BY SINGLETON, MAURICE E AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, BRIDGETTE COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP WILLIAMS, LASHAUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
